ST.xhtml: LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer);

Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus), pBusyStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.busyStatus));

documentation.xhtml: Error ID according to Beckhoff/PlcOpen Motion Control

ST.xhtml: SUPER^();

documentation.xhtml: The process corresponding to the step

ST.xhtml: statuses.enabledStatus( isEnabled := isEnabled );

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer);

documentation.xhtml: Error ID according to Beckhoff XML Data Server library

ST.xhtml: SUPER^();

documentation.xhtml: The AXIS_REF to be linked to the NC I/O
Tolerance in [main units] per second: if < ABS(this value), then the axis is considered to be standing still

ST.xhtml: moveVelocity := THIS^.processes.moveVelocity.request( value := value );
reset := THIS^.processes.reset.request();
stop := THIS^.processes.stop.request();
power := THIS^.processes.power.request( enable := enable );
gearIn := THIS^.processes.gearIn.request();
gearOut := THIS^.processes.gearOut.request();
initialize := THIS^.processes.initialize.request();
setPosition := THIS^.processes.setPosition.request( value := value );
enableExtSetGen := THIS^.processes.enableExtSetGen.request();
disableExtSetGen := THIS^.processes.disableExtSetGen.request();
forceCalibration := THIS^.processes.forceCalibration.request();
resetCalibration := THIS^.processes.resetCalibration.request();
readParameter := THIS^.processes.readParameter.request( parameterNumber := parameterNumber );
readBoolParameter := THIS^.processes.readBoolParameter.request( parameterNumber := parameterNumber );
probeAbort := THIS^.processes.probeAbort.request();

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to
Current in milliamps, linked to PDO

ST.xhtml: write := THIS^.processes.write.request( index := index, subindex := subindex, noOfBytes := noOfBytes, value1Byte := value1Byte, value2Bytes := value2Bytes, value4Bytes := value4Bytes);
read := THIS^.processes.read.request( index := index, subindex := subindex, noOfBytes := noOfBytes);
initialize := THIS^.processes.initialize.request();

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: THIS^.processes.write._log( name := 'processes.write', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.read._log( name := 'processes.read', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.initialize._log( name := 'processes.initialize', buffer := subBuffer); LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus), pBusyStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.busyStatus));

documentation.xhtml: Torque feedback, cyclically updated by the drive channel
Torque command (only in case of torque control!)
Digital inputs (e.g. bit 0 = 1 if input 0 = high), cyclically updated by the drive channel
Digital outputs (e.g. bit 0 = 1 if input 0 = high), cyclically updated by the drive channel
True if the drive is in safe state
The actual torque feedback value (updated constantly!)
The motor torque constant, in Nm/A
The drive operating mode, as an ENUM value
The drive operating mode, as a descriptive text
The drive brake state, as an ENUM value
The drive brake state, as a descriptive text
The torque command (only in case of torque control!)
Error acknowledge of AX5805 safety card

ST.xhtml: write := THIS^.processes.write.request( index := index, noOfBytes := noOfBytes, value1Byte := value1Byte, value2Bytes := value2Bytes, value4Bytes := value4Bytes);
update := THIS^.processes.update.request();
reset := THIS^.processes.reset.request();
acknowledgeSafetyError := THIS^.processes.acknowledgeSafetyError.request();
setBrake := THIS^.processes.setBrake.request( newState := newState );

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: THIS^.processes.read._log( name := 'processes.read', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.write._log( name := 'processes.write', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.update._log( name := 'processes.update', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.reset._log( name := 'processes.reset', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.acknowledgeSafetyError._log( name := 'processes.acknowledgeSafetyError', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.setBrake._log( name := 'processes.setBrake', buffer := subBuffer); LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus), pBusyStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.busyStatus));

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: THIS^.parts.channelA._log( name := 'channelA', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.parts.channelB._log( name := 'channelB', buffer := subBuffer); LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus), pBusyStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.busyStatus));
statuses.healthStatus( isGood := NOT(dataError OR (frameError OR (powerFailure OR syncError))) );

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus));
enableCounterResetC := THIS^.processes.enableCounterResetC.request();
disableCounterResetC := THIS^.processes.disableCounterResetC.request();

ST.xhtml: THIS^.processes.enableCounterResetC._log( name := 'processes.enableCounterResetC', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.disableCounterResetC._log( name := 'processes.disableCounterResetC', buffer := subBuffer); LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus), pBusyStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.busyStatus));

documentation.xhtml: Label according to the electric schemes

ST.xhtml: statuses.healthStatus( isGood := (wcState = FALSE) AND (infoData = 8) );

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus));

documentation.xhtml: Number of boxes with BoxState unequal to 0
CAN state (See system manager for bit interpretation

ST.xhtml: statuses.healthStatus( isGood := error = 0 );

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus));
current( newAmpsValue := microAmpsValue / 1000000.0 ); statuses.healthStatus( isGood := NOT(error) );

ST.xhtml: LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus));

documentation.xhtml: Boolean, to bind to digital output

ST.xhtml: statuses.busyStatus( isBusy := processes.setEnabled.statuses.busyStatus.busy ); processes.setEnabled( isEnabled := isEnabled AND processes.setEnabled.statuses.busyStatus.idle );
setEnabled := THIS^.processes.setEnabled.request( enabled := enabled );

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: THIS^.processes.setEnabled._log( name := 'processes.setEnabled', buffer := subBuffer); LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pBusyStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.busyStatus));

documentation.xhtml: Full path of the config filename

ST.xhtml: save := THIS^.processes.save.request( filePath := filePath );
load := THIS^.processes.load.request( filePath := filePath );
activate := THIS^.processes.activate.request();

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: THIS^.processes.save._log( name := 'processes.save', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.load._log( name := 'processes.load', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.activate._log( name := 'processes.activate', buffer := subBuffer); LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pHealthStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.healthStatus), pBusyStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.busyStatus));

documentation.xhtml: Number of retries for a succesfull process

ST.xhtml: writeCoil := THIS^.processes.writeCoil.request( unitID := unitID, address := address, value := value);
writeRegister := THIS^.processes.writeRegister.request( unitID := unitID, address := address, value := value);
diagnostics := THIS^.processes.diagnostics.request( unitID := unitID, subFunction := subFunction, subData := subData);

documentation.xhtml: Name of this function block instance
Buffer to write all logging to
Temporary buffer to write logging by parts (sub-statemachines) to

ST.xhtml: THIS^.processes.readCoil._log( name := 'processes.readCoil', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.writeCoil._log( name := 'processes.writeCoil', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.readRegister._log( name := 'processes.readRegister', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.writeRegister._log( name := 'processes.writeRegister', buffer := subBuffer); THIS^.processes.diagnostics._log( name := 'processes.diagnostics', buffer := subBuffer); LOGGER( name := name, actualStatus := THIS^.actualStatus, previousStatus := THIS^.previousStatus, buffer := buffer, subBuffer := subBuffer, pBusyStatus := ADR(THIS^.statuses.busyStatus));

documentation.xhtml: At least 1 variable needed because subclass members of an empty class are not exposed by OPC UA (TwinCAT bug!)

ST.xhtml: THIS^.statuses.busyStatus( isBusy := TRUE ); THIS^.statuses.healthStatus( isGood := TRUE );

documentation.xhtml: At least 1 variable needed because subclass members of an empty class are not exposed by OPC UA (TwinCAT bug!)

ST.xhtml: THIS^.statuses.busyStatus( isBusy := TRUE ); THIS^.statuses.healthStatus( isGood := TRUE );

Arguments in use by the process, if do_request was accepted

New position to be taken over by the encoder
New position to be taken over by the encoder
Arguments to be set, before writing do_request TRUE
Arguments in use by the process, if do_request was accepted
Deceleration (use 0 for default). If non zero, then also jerk must be non zero!
Jerk (use 0 for default). If non zero, then also deceleration must be non zero!
Deceleration (use 0 for default). If non zero, then also jerk must be non zero!
Jerk (use 0 for default). If non zero, then also deceleration must be non zero!
Arguments to be set, before writing do_request TRUE
Arguments in use by the process, if do_request was accepted
Arguments to be set, before writing do_request TRUE
Arguments in use by the process, if do_request was accepted
True to enable, false to disable
True to enable, false to disable

Arguments in use by the process, if do_request was accepted
Arguments to be set, before writing do_request TRUE
Arguments in use by the process, if do_request was accepted
True to probe the rising edge, false to probe the falling edge
Timeout, in seconds. After this timeout, probing is aborted. timeout <= 0 means endless probing.
True to probe the rising edge, false to probe the falling edge
Timeout, in seconds. After this timeout, probing is aborted. timeout <= 0 means endless probing.
Value that has been read, if noOfBytes is 1
Value that has been read, if noOfBytes is 2
Value that has been read, if noOfBytes is 4
